conflict: Gideon holds Junie's fuel notes and forces Silas into a public regatta christening where refusal would cost his sister immediate livelihood.
consequence: Silas caves under leverage and publicly seals the official name, breaking his bond with Inez and worsening the city's crisis.
must_land_beats: Make the leverage concrete and domestic rather than abstractly villainous.
Let Silas enter the stage believing he might still subvert it, so failure feels chosen under pressure rather than theatrically inevitable.
Show the crowd repeat the name in a way that makes the harm feel unstoppable once spoken.
Give Inez a witnessed reason to withdraw that is larger than wounded pride.
End with the official name catching in public ear and body.
pressure_source: Gideon holds Junie's fuel notes and forces Silas into a public regatta christening where refusal would cost his sister immediate livelihood.
state_shift: Silas caves under leverage and publicly seals the official name, breaking his bond with Inez and worsening the city's crisis.
